## Type of Change

<!-- Check all that apply. -->

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change that fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change that adds functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that changes existing behaviour)
- [ ] Refactor (no functional change — code cleanup, renaming, restructuring)
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] CI / tooling change
- [ ] Dependency update

## Related Issues

<!-- Link any related issues: "Closes #123", "Fixes #456", "Related to #789" -->

Closes #

## Testing

<!-- Describe how you tested your changes. -->

- [ ] Unit tests pass (`npm run test:unit`)
- [ ] E2E tests pass (`npm test`)
- [ ] TypeScript type check passes (`npm run check-types`)
- [ ] Lint passes (`npm run lint`)
- [ ] Formatting passes (`npm run format:check`)
- [ ] Manually verified in VS Code Extension Development Host

## Checklist

- [ ] My commit messages follow [Conventional Commits](https://www.conventionalcommits.org/) (`feat:`, `fix:`, `docs:`, etc.)
- [ ] I have updated documentation where relevant (README, docs/, CHANGELOG)
- [ ] I have not introduced any `any` types (strict TypeScript is required)
- [ ] I have not broken the public API surface
